hyperedges.label: Three Test Suite Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: Three parallel test suites covering LLM/Session state, remaining modules, and security. All use pytest framework, share ASCII-only and dynamic category principles, and cover the Enhanced Cognee codebase.

hyperedges.label: ASCII-Only Requirement Cross-Cutting Concern
hyperedges.description: The ASCII-only output requirement is a cross-cutting concern enforced in test suites and production code. The unicode encoding blocker in multi_tenant/ecosystem modules is a direct consequence (rationale) of not following this requirement in source code.

hyperedges.label: Security Compliance Framework Coverage
hyperedges.description: Security test suite provides coverage across three major compliance frameworks: OWASP Top 10 (8 categories), GDPR (Articles 15, 17, 20 + PII masking), and NIST Security Framework (Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, Recover). All implemented via the enhanced security framework tests.

hyperedges.label: Three Test Suite Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: Three parallel test suites covering LLM/Session state, remaining modules, and security. All use pytest framework, share ASCII-only and dynamic category principles, and cover the Enhanced Cognee codebase.

hyperedges.label: ASCII-Only Requirement Cross-Cutting Concern
hyperedges.description: The ASCII-only output requirement is a cross-cutting concern enforced in test suites and production code. The unicode encoding blocker in multi_tenant/ecosystem modules is a direct consequence (rationale) of not following this requirement in source code.

hyperedges.label: Security Compliance Framework Coverage
hyperedges.description: Security test suite provides coverage across three major compliance frameworks: OWASP Top 10 (8 categories), GDPR (Articles 15, 17, 20 + PII masking), and NIST Security Framework (Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, Recover). All implemented via the enhanced security framework tests.
